Objective\nDevelop a comprehensive web application named 'MovieTicketing' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse movies, view showtimes, select seats, book tickets, view booking history, and manage theater information. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.\n\n## 2. Language\nThe required development language for the 'MovieTicketing' application is Python.\n\n## 3. Page Design\n\nThe 'MovieTicketing' web application will consist of the following eight pages:\n\n### 1. Dashboard Page\n- **Page Title**: Movie Ticketing Dashboard\n- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured movies, upcoming releases, and quick navigation to all functionalities.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.\n  - **ID: featured-movies** - Type: Div - Display of featured movie recommendations.\n  - **ID: browse-movies-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to movie catalog page.\n  - **ID: view-bookings-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to booking history page.\n  - **ID: showtimes-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to showtimes page.\n\n### 2. Movie Catalog Page\n- **Page Title**: Movie Catalog\n- **Overview**: A page displaying all available movies with search and filter capabilities.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.\n  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search movies by title or genre.\n  - **ID: genre-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by genre (Action, Comedy, Drama, Horror, etc.).\n  - **ID: movies-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying movie cards with poster, title, rating, and duration.\n  - **ID: view-movie-button-{movie_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view movie details (each movie card has this).\n\n### 3. Movie Details Page\n- **Page Title**: Movie Details\n- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific movie.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: movie-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the movie details page.\n  - **ID: movie-title** - Type: H1 - Display movie title.\n  - **ID: movie-director** - Type: Div - Display movie director.\n  - **ID: movie-rating** - Type: Div - Display movie rating.\n  - **ID: movie-description** - Type: Div - Display movie description.\n  - **ID: select-showtime-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to showtime selection.\n\n### 4. Showtime Selection Page\n- **Page Title**: Select Showtime\n- **Overview**: A page displaying available showtimes for the selected movie in different theaters.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: showtime-page** - Type: Div - Container for the showtime page.\n  - **ID: showtimes-list** - Type: Div - List of available showtimes with date, time, theater, and price.\n  - **ID: theater-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter showtimes by theater.\n  - **ID: date-filter** - Type: Input - Field to filter showtimes by date.\n  - **ID: select-showtime-button-{showtime_id}** - Type: Button - Button to select a specific showtime.\n\n### 5. Seat Selection Page\n- **Page Title**: Select Seats\n- **Overview**: A page for users to select seats from an interactive seat map.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: seat-selection-page** - Type: Div - Container for the seat selection page.\n  - **ID: seat-map** - Type: Div - Interactive seat map showing available and booked seats.\n  - **ID: selected-seats-display** - Type: Div - Display of currently selected seats.\n  - **ID: seat-{row}{col}** - Type: Button - Individual seat button (e.g., seat-A1, seat-B3).\n  - **ID: proceed-booking-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to booking confirmation.\n\n### 6. Booking Confirmation Page\n- **Page Title**: Booking Confirmation\n- **Overview**: A page for users to review booking details and complete the purchase.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: confirmation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the confirmation page.\n  - **ID: booking-summary** - Type: Div - Summary of booking details (movie, showtime, seats, total).\n  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.\n  - **ID: customer-email** - Type: Input - Field to input customer email.\n  - **ID: confirm-booking-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and complete booking.\n\n### 7. Booking History Page\n- **Page Title**: Booking History\n- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous bookings with ticket information.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: bookings-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookings page.\n  - **ID: bookings-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying bookings with booking ID, movie, date, seats, and status.\n  - **ID: view-booking-button-{booking_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view booking details (each booking has this).\n  - **ID: status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Confirmed, Cancelled, Completed).\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n\n### 8. Theater Information Page\n- **Page Title**: Theater Information\n- **Overview**: A page displaying information about theaters and their facilities.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: theater-page** - Type: Div - Container for the theater page.\n  - **ID: theaters-list** - Type: Div - List of all theaters with location, screens, and facilities.\n  - **ID: theater-location-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter theaters by location.\n  - **ID: facilities-display** - Type: Div - Display of theater facilities and amenities.\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n\n## 4. Data Storage\n\nThe 'MovieTicketing' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:\n\n### 1. Movies Data\n- **File Name**: `movies.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  movie_id|title|director|genre|rating|duration|description|release_date\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|The Matrix|Lana Wachowski|Action|8.7|136|A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.|1999-03-31\n  2|Inception|Christopher Nolan|Sci-Fi|8.8|148|A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.|2010-07-16\n  3|The Shawshank Redemption|Frank Darabont|Drama|9.3|142|Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.|1994-09-23\n  ```\n\n### 2. Theaters Data\n- **File Name**: `theaters.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  theater_id|theater_name|location|city|screens|facilities\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|Cinema Max|123 Main St|New York|10|IMAX, Dolby, Wheelchair Access\n  2|Galaxy Cinemas|456 Broadway|Los Angeles|8|3D, Premium Sound, Parking\n  3|Starlight Theater|789 Park Ave|Chicago|6|Luxury Seating, Restaurant, VIP Lounge\n  ```\n\n### 3. Showtimes Data\n- **File Name**: `showtimes.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  showtime_id|movie_id|theater_id|showtime_date|showtime_time|price|available_seats\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|1|1|2025-02-01|19:00|12.99|85\n  2|1|1|2025-02-01|22:30|12.99|40\n  3|2|2|2025-02-01|18:00|14.99|95\n  ```\n\n### 4. Seats Data\n- **File Name**: `seats.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  seat_id|theater_id|screen_id|row|column|seat_type|status\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|1|1|A|1|Standard|Available\n  2|1|1|A|2|Standard|Available\n  3|1|1|B|5|Premium|Booked\n  ```\n\n### 5. Bookings Data\n- **File Name**: `bookings.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  booking_id|showtime_id|customer_name|customer_email|booking_date|total_price|status|seats_booked\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|1|John Doe|john@example.com|2025-01-15|25.98|Confirmed|A1,A2\n  2|2|Jane Smith|jane@example.com|2025-01-16|12.99|Confirmed|F10\n  3|3|Robert Johnson|robert@example.com|2025-01-17|29.98|Confirmed|C3,C4\n  ```\n\n### 6. Genres Data\n- **File Name**: `genres.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  genre_id|genre_name|description\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|Action|Fast-paced movies with exciting sequences and combat\n  2|Drama|Character-driven stories exploring complex themes\n  3|Sci-Fi|Science fiction with futuristic technology and concepts\n  ```\n\n\n=== design_spec.md ===\n# MovieTicketing Web Application Design Specification\n\n---\n\n## Overview\nThe MovieTicketing web application enables users to seamlessly browse movies, view showtimes, select seats, book tickets, review booking history, and access theater information. The app uses local text files for data storage in a structured 'data' directory. It consists of eight main pages starting from the Dashboard.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Pages and Routes\n\n### 1. Dashboard Page\n- **Route Path**: `/`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: GET  \n- **Page Title**: Movie Ticketing Dashboard\n- **Purpose**: Main hub displaying featured movies and navigation buttons.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Main container\n  - `featured-movies` (Div) - Featured movie recommendations\n  - `browse-movies-button` (Button) - Navigates to Movie Catalog Page\n  - `view-bookings-button` (Button) - Navigates to Booking History Page\n  - `showtimes-button` (Button) - Navigates to Showtime Selection Page\n\n### 2. Movie Catalog Page\n- **Route Path**: `/catalog`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: GET  \n- **Page Title**: Movie Catalog\n- **Purpose**: Browse all movies with search and genre filter functionality.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `catalog-page` (Div) - Main container\n  - `search-input` (Input) - Field to search movies by title or genre\n  - `genre-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter by genre (Action, Comedy, Drama, Horror, etc.)\n  - `movies-grid` (Div) - Displays movie cards\n  - `view-movie-button-{movie_id}` (Button) - Dynamic buttons for viewing movie details\n\n### 3. Movie Details Page\n- **Route Path**: `/movie/<int:movie_id>`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: GET  \n- **Page Title**: Movie Details\n- **Purpose**: Display detailed information of the selected movie.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `movie-details-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `movie-title` (H1) - Movie title\n  - `movie-director` (Div) - Director name\n  - `movie-rating` (Div) - Movie rating\n  - `movie-description` (Div) - Movie description\n  - `select-showtime-button` (Button) - Proceed to showtime selection\n\n### 4. Showtime Selection Page\n- **Route Path**: `/showtimes/<int:movie_id>`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: GET  \n- **Page Title**: Select Showtime\n- **Purpose**: Show available showtimes for the selected movie with filters.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `showtime-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `showtimes-list` (Div) - List of showtimes with date, time, theater, price\n  - `theater-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter by theater\n  - `date-filter` (Input) - Filter by date\n  - `select-showtime-button-{showtime_id}` (Button) - Select a showtime\n\n### 5. Seat Selection Page\n- **Route Path**: `/seats/<int:showtime_id>`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: GET  \n- **Page Title**: Select Seats\n- **Purpose**: Interactive seat map for seat selection.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `seat-selection-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `seat-map` (Div) - Interactive seat map\n  - `selected-seats-display` (Div) - Shows currently selected seats\n  - `seat-{row}{col}` (Button) - Individual seat buttons, e.g., seat-A1\n  - `proceed-booking-button` (Button) - Proceed to booking confirmation\n\n### 6. Booking Confirmation Page\n- **Route Path**: `/confirm-booking`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: POST (submit booking), GET (display form)  \n- **Page Title**: Booking Confirmation\n- **Purpose**: Review booking details and complete purchase.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `confirmation-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `booking-summary` (Div) - Details of movie, showtime, seats, total\n  - `customer-name` (Input) - Input customer name\n  - `customer-email` (Input) - Input customer email\n  - `confirm-booking-button` (Button) - Confirm and finalize booking\n\n### 7. Booking History Page\n- **Route Path**: `/bookings`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: GET  \n- **Page Title**: Booking History\n- **Purpose**: Display previous bookings with filters.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `bookings-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `bookings-table` (Table) - List bookings with ID, movie, date, seats, status\n  - `view-booking-button-{booking_id}` (Button) - View booking details\n  - `status-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter by status (All, Confirmed, Cancelled, Completed)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate back to Dashboard\n\n### 8. Theater Information Page\n- **Route Path**: `/theaters`  \n- **HTTP Verb**: GET  \n- **Page Title**: Theater Information\n- **Purpose**: Show theater details and facilities.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `theater-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `theaters-list` (Div) - List theaters with location, screens, facilities\n  - `theater-location-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter by location\n  - `facilities-display` (Div) - Show amenities\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate back to Dashboard\n\n---\n\n## 2. Navigation Flow\n\n- The starting page is the Dashboard (`/`).\n- From Dashboard:\n  - `browse-movies-button` → Movie Catalog Page (`/catalog`)\n  - `view-bookings-button` → Booking History Page (`/bookings`)\n  - `showtimes-button` → Showtime Selection Page (if movie selected `/showtimes/<movie_id>`, else Catalog or Dashboard)\n\n- From Movie Catalog:\n  - `view-movie-button-{movie_id}` → Movie Details Page (`/movie/<movie_id>`)\n\n- From Movie Details:\n  - `select-showtime-button` → Showtime Selection Page (`/showtimes/<movie_id>`)\n\n- From Showtime Selection:\n  - `select-showtime-button-{showtime_id}` → Seat Selection Page (`/seats/<showtime_id>`)\n\n- From Seat Selection:\n  - `proceed-booking-button` → Booking Confirmation Page (`/confirm-booking`)\n\n- From Booking Confirmation:\n  - `confirm-booking-button` submits booking, redirect as needed\n\n- From Booking History:\n  - `view-booking-button-{booking_id}` shows details (modal or new page)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → Dashboard (`/`)\n\n- From Theater Information:\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → Dashboard (`/`)\n\n---\n\n## 3. Local Data Handling\n\nAll data are stored in text files in a `data` directory and use pipe `|` delimited formats.\n\n- `movies.txt`: `movie_id|title|director|genre|rating|duration|description|release_date` (Used in Movie Catalog, Details, Showtime Selection)\n- `theaters.txt`: `theater_id|theater_name|location|city|screens|facilities` (Used in Theater Information, Showtime Selection)\n- `showtimes.txt`: `showtime_id|movie_id|theater_id|showtime_date|showtime_time|price|available_seats` (Used in Showtime Selection, Seat Selection, Booking Confirmation)\n- `seats.txt`: `seat_id|theater_id|screen_id|row|column|seat_type|status` (Used in Seat Selection)\n- `bookings.txt`: `booking_id|showtime_id|customer_name|customer_email|booking_date|total_price|status|seats_booked` (Used in Booking History, Confirmation)\n- `genres.txt`: `genre_id|genre_name|description` (Used in Movie Catalog for genre filtering)\n\nData reading and writing should handle serialization and updates for seat availability and booking status.\n\n---\n\n## 4. UI Element Summary\n\n### Dashboard Page (`/`)\n| Element ID             | Type    | Description                       |\n|-----------------------|---------|---------------------------------|\n| dashboard-page        | Div     | Main container                   |\n| featured-movies       | Div     | Show featured movies             |\n| browse-movies-button  | Button  | Navigate to Movie Catalog        |\n| view-bookings-button  | Button  | Navigate to Booking History      |\n| showtimes-button      | Button  | Navigate to Showtimes            |\n\n### Movie Catalog Page (`/catalog`)\n| Element ID                 | Type     | Description                         |\n|----------------------------|----------|-----------------------------------|\n| catalog-page movie-rating           | Div     | Movie rating                      |\n| movie-description      | Div     | Movie description                 |\n| select-showtime-button | Button  | Proceed to   [app_candidate_a.py] from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for, flash import os from datetime import datetime  app = Flask(__name__) app.secret_key = 'secretkeyfortesting'  DATA_DIR = 'data'  def read_data_file(filename):     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)     data = []     if not os.path.exists(path):         return data     with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             line=line.strip()             if line:                 data.append(line.split('|'))     return data  def write_data_file(filename, data_lines):     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)     with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for items in data_lines:             f.write('|'.join(items) + '\n')  def load_movies():     raw = read_data_file('movies.txt')     movies = []     for m in raw:         if len(m)<8:             continue         try:             movies.append({                 'movie_id': int(m[0]),                 'title': m[1],                 'director': m[2],                 'genre': m[3],                 'rating': float(m[4]),                 'duration': int(m[5]),                 'description': m[6],                 'release_date': m[7]             })         except:             continue     return movies  def load_theaters():     raw = read_data_file('theaters.txt')     theaters = []     for t in raw:         if len(t)<6:             continue         try:             theaters.append({                 'theater_id': int(t[0]),                 'theater_name': t[1],                 'location': t[2],                 'city': t[3],                 'screens': int(t[4]),                 'facilities': t[5]             })         except:             continue     return theaters  def load_showtimes():     raw = read_data_file('showtimes.txt')     showtimes = []     for s in raw:         if len(s)<7:             continue         try:             showtimes.append({                 'showtime_id': int(s[0]),                 'movie_id': int(s[1]),                 'theater_id': int(s[2]),                 'showtime_date': s[3],                 'showtime_time': s[4],                 'price': float(s[5]),                 'available_seats': int(s[6])             })         except:             continue     return showtimes  def load_seats():     raw = read_data_file('seats.txt')     seats = []     for s in raw:         if len(s)<7:             continue         try:             seats.append({                 'seat_id': int(s[0]),                 'theater_id': int(s[1]),                 'screen_id': int(s[2]),                 'row': s[3],                 'column': int(s[4]),                 'seat_type': s[5],                 'status': s[6]             })         except:             continue     return seats  def load_bookings():     raw = read_data_file('bookings.txt')     bookings = []     for b in raw:         if len(b)<8:             continue         try:             seats_list = b[7].split(',') if b[7] else []             bookings.append({                 'booking_id': int(b[0]),                 'showtime_id': int(b[1]),                 'customer_name': b[2],                 'customer_email': b[3],                 'booking_date': b[4],                 'total_price': float(b[5]),                 'status': b[6],                 'seats_booked': seats_list             })         except:             continue     return bookings  def load_genres():     raw = read_data_file('genres.txt')     genres = []     for g in raw:         if len(g)<3:             continue         try:             genres.append({                 'genre_id': int(g[0]),                 'genre_name': g[1],                 'description': g[2]             })         except:             continue     return genres  def get_next_id(list_of_dicts, field):     if not list_of_dicts:         return 1     return max(item[field] for item in list_of_dicts) + 1  # ROUTES  @app.route('/') def dashboard():     movies = load_movies()     # Featured: 3 most recent by release_date descending     featured = sorted(movies, key=lambda m: m['release_date'], reverse=True)[:3]     return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_movies=featured)  @app.route('/catalog') def catalog():     movies = load_movies()     genres = load_genres()     search = request.args.get('search','').strip().lower()     genre_filter = request.args.get('genre_filter','')      filtered = movies     if search:         filtered = [m for m in filtered if search in m['title'].lower() or search in m['genre'].lower()]     if genre_filter:         filtered = [m for m in filtered if m['genre'].lower() == genre_filter.lower()]      return render_template('catalog.html', movies=filtered, genres=genres, search=search, genre_filter=genre_filter)  @app.route('/movie/<int:movie_id>') def movie_details(movie_id):     movies = load_movies()     movie = next((m for m in movies if m['movie_id']==movie_id), None)     if not movie:         flash('Movie not found.')         return redirect(url_for('catalog'))     return render_template('movie_details.html', movie=movie)  @app.route('/showtimes/<int:movie_id>') def showtimes(movie_id):     showtimes = load_showtimes()     theaters = load_theaters()     theater_filter = request.args.get('theater_filter','')     date_filter = request.args.get('date_filter','')      filtered = [s for s in showtimes if s['movie_id']==movie_id]      if theater_filter:         try:             theater_id_filter = int(theater_filter)             filtered = [s for s in filtered if s['theater_id']==theater_id_filter]         except:             pass      if date_filter:         filtered = [s for s in filtered if s['showtime_date']==date_filter]      theater_dict = {t['theater_id']: t for t in theaters}     return render_template('showtimes.html', showtimes=filtered,                            theaters=theaters,                            theater_filter=theater_filter,                            date_filter=date_filter,                            theater_dict=theater_dict,                            movie_id=movie_id)  @app.route('/seats/<int:showtime_id>', methods=['GET','POST']) def seats(showtime_id):     showtimes = load_showtimes()     showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id), None)     if not showtime:         flash("Showtime not found.")         return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))      theaters = load_theaters()     theater = next((t for t in theaters if t['theater_id']==showtime['theater_id']), None)     if not theater:         flash("Theater not found.")         return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))      seats_all = load_seats()     theater_seats = [s for s in seats_all if s['theater_id']==theater['theater_id']]     # Group seats by row, sorted by column:     seat_map = {}     for s in theater_seats:         seat_map.setdefault(s['row'], []).append(s)     for r in seat_map:         seat_map[r].sort(key=lambda x: x['column'])     sorted_rows = sorted(seat_map.keys())      if request.method == 'POST':         selected_seats = request.form.get('selected_seats','')         if not selected_seats:             flash("Please select at least one seat.")             return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id))         seats_list = selected_seats.split(',')         # Validate seats availability         booked_seat_codes = {seat['row']+str(seat['column']) for seat in seats_all if seat['status'].lower()=='booked' and seat['theater_id']==theater['theater_id']}         for seat_code in seats_list:             if seat_code in booked_seat_codes:                 flash(f"Seat {seat_code} is already booked.")                 return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id))         # Redirect to confirm booking with params         return redirect(url_for('confirm_booking', showtime_id=showtime_id, seats=selected_seats))      return render_template('seats.html', showtime=showtime, theater=theater,                            seat_map=seat_map, rows=sorted_rows)  @app.route('/confirm-booking', methods=['GET','POST']) def confirm_booking():     if request.method == 'GET':         showtime_id = request.args.get('showtime_id')         seats = request.args.get('seats','')         if not showtime_id or not seats:             flash("Booking info missing. Please select seats first.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))         try:             showtime_id_int = int(showtime_id)         except:             flash("Invalid showtime.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          showtimes = load_showtimes()         showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id_int), None)         if not showtime:             flash("Showtime not found.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          movies = load_movies()         movie = next((m for m in movies if m['movie_id']==showtime['movie_id']), None)         if not movie:             flash('Movie not found.')             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          seats_list = seats.split(',')         return render_template('confirm_booking.html',                                showtime=showtime,                                movie=movie,                                seats=seats_list)      elif request.method == 'POST':         showtime_id = request.form.get('showtime_id')         seats = request.form.get('seats')         customer_name = request.form.get('customer_name','').strip()         customer_email = request.form.get('customer_email','').strip()          if not (showtime_id and seats and customer_name and customer_email):             flash("All fields are required.")             return redirect(request.url)          try:             showtime_id_int = int(showtime_id)         except:             flash("Invalid showtime.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          seats_list = seats.split(',')          showtimes = load_showtimes()         showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id_int), None)         if not showtime:             flash("Showtime not found.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          # Check seats availability to avoid double booking         seats_all = load_seats()         theater_id = showtime['theater_id']         booked_seats_set = {s['row']+str(s['column']) for s in seats_all if s['theater_id']==theater_id and s['status'].lower() == 'booked'}         for seat_code in seats_list:             if seat_code in booked_seats_set:                 flash(f"Seat {seat_code} is already booked.")                 return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id_int))          bookings = load_bookings()         next_booking_id = get_next_id(bookings, 'booking_id')         booking_date = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')         total_price = showtime['price'] * len(seats_list)          # Add new booking record         bookings.append({             'booking_id': next_booking_id,             'showtime_id': showtime_id_int,             'customer_name': customer_name,             'customer_email': customer_email,             'booking_date': booking_date,             'total_price': total_price,             'status': 'Confirmed',             'seats_booked': seats         })          # Write bookings back         lines = []         for b in bookings:             lines.append([                 str(b['booking_id']),                 str(b['showtime_id']),                 b['customer_name'],                 b['customer_email'],                 b['booking_date'],                 f"{b['total_price']:.2f}",                 b['status'],                 b['seats_booked']             ])         write_data_file('bookings.txt', lines)          # Update seats.txt to mark selected seats booked         for seat in seats_all:             seat_code = seat['row'] + str(seat['column'])             if seat['theater_id'] == theater_id and seat_code in seats_list:                 seat['status'] = 'Booked'         seat_lines = []         for s in seats_all:             seat_lines.append([                 str(s['seat_id']),                 str(s['theater_id']),                 str(s['screen_id']),                 s['row'],                 str(s['column']),                 s['seat_type'],                 s['status']             ])         write_data_file('seats.txt', seat_lines)          flash("Booking confirmed!")         return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))  @app.route('/bookings') def bookings():     bookings = load_bookings()     movies = load_movies()     showtimes = load_showtimes()     movie_dict = {m['movie_id']: m for m in movies}     showtime_dict = {s['showtime_id']: s for s in showtimes}      status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter','').lower()     filtered = bookings     if status_filter and status_filter != 'all':         filtered = [b for b in bookings if b['status'].lower() == status_filter]      # We'll pass showtime_dict and movie_dict for template to map booking->showtime->movie->title     return render_template('bookings.html',                            bookings=filtered,                            movie_dict=movie_dict,                            showtime_dict=showtime_dict,                            status_filter=status_filter)  @app.route('/theaters') def theaters():     theaters = load_theaters()     location_filter = request.args.get('location_filter','').strip()     filtered = theaters     if location_filter:         filtered = [t for t in theaters if location_filter.lower() in (t['location'].lower() + ' ' + t['city'].lower())]      locations = sorted(set([t['location'] for t in theaters] + [t['city'] for t in theaters]))      facilities_display = ''     if len(filtered)==1:         facilities_display = filtered[0]['facilities']      return render_template('theaters.html',                            theaters=filtered,                            locations=locations,                            location_filter=location_filter,                            facilities_display=facilities_display)  if __name__ == '__main__':     if not os.path.exists(DATA_DIR):         os.makedirs(DATA_DIR)     app.run(debug=True)

  [/home/jun/0624/emnlp_CaMP_v2/results/Software-web/20260713_210028_869102_only_parallel_merge/MovieTicketing/vanilla/templates_candidate_a/seats.html] <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head>     <meta charset="UTF-8" />     <title>Select Seats</title>     <style>     .seat-button {         margin: 2px;         color: white;         cursor: not-allowed;     }     .selected-seat {         background-color: #ff9800 !important;     }     </style>     <script>     function toggleSeat(button) {         if (button.classList.contains('seat-booked')) return;         button.classList.toggle('selected-seat');         const seatCode = button.getAttribute('data-seat-code');         let selectedSeats = document.getElementById('selected-seats-display').innerText.split(', ').filter(s=>s);         if (button.classList.contains('selected-seat')) {             selectedSeats.push(seatCode);         } else {             selectedSeats = selectedSeats.filter(s=>s!==seatCode);         }         document.getElementById('selected-seats-display').innerText = selectedSeats.join(', ');         document.getElementById('selected_seats_input').value = selectedSeats.join(',');     }     function submitSeats() {         const seatsVal = document.getElementById('selected_seats_input').value;         if (!seatsVal) {             alert('Please select at least one seat.');             return false;         }         return true;     }     </script> </head> <body>     <div id="seat-selection-page">         <h1>Select Seats</h1>         <div id="seat-map">             <form method="post" onsubmit="return submitSeats()">                 {% for row in rows %}                 <div>                     <span>{{ row }}</span>                     {% for seat in seat_map[row] %}                     <button type="button" id="seat-{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}" class="seat-button {% if seat.status.lower()=='available' %}seat-available{% else %}seat-booked{% endif %}" data-seat-code="{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}" onclick="toggleSeat(this)" {% if seat.status.lower()!='available' %}disabled{% endif %}>{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}</button>                     {% endfor %}                 </div>                 {% endfor %}                 <div>Selected Seats: <span id="selected-seats-display"></span></div>                 <input type="hidden" name="selected_seats" id="selected_seats_input" value="" />                 <button id="proceed-booking-button" type="submit">Proceed to Booking</button>             </form>         </div>     </div> </body> </html>

=== LLM_call: ImplementationMerger ===
INPUT: === app_candidate_a.py ===
from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for, flash
import os
from datetime import datetime

app = Flask(__name__)
app.secret_key = 'secretkeyfortesting'

DATA_DIR = 'data'

def read_data_file(filename):
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)
    data = []
    if not os.path.exists(path):
        return data
    with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            line=line.strip()
            if line:
                data.append(line.split('|'))
    return data

def write_data_file(filename, data_lines):
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)
    with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for items in data_lines:
            f.write('|'.join(items) + '\n')

def load_movies():
    raw = read_data_file('movies.txt')
    movies = []
    for m in raw:
        if len(m)<8:
            continue
        try:
            movies.append({
                'movie_id': int(m[0]),
                'title': m[1],
                'director': m[2],
                'genre': m[3],
                'rating': float(m[4]),
                'duration': int(m[5]),
                'description': m[6],
                'release_date': m[7]
            })
        except:
            continue
    return movies

def load_theaters():
    raw = read_data_file('theaters.txt')
    theaters = []
    for t in raw:
        if len(t)<6:
            continue
        try:
            theaters.append({
                'theater_id': int(t[0]),
                'theater_name': t[1],
                'location': t[2],
                'city': t[3],
                'screens': int(t[4]),
                'facilities': t[5]
            })
        except:
            continue
    return theaters

def load_showtimes():
    raw = read_data_file('showtimes.txt')
    showtimes = []
    for s in raw:
        if len(s)<7:
            continue
        try:
            showtimes.append({
                'showtime_id': int(s[0]),
                'movie_id': int(s[1]),
                'theater_id': int(s[2]),
                'showtime_date': s[3],
                'showtime_time': s[4],
                'price': float(s[5]),
                'available_seats': int(s[6])
            })
        except:
            continue
    return showtimes

def load_seats():
    raw = read_data_file('seats.txt')
    seats = []
    for s in raw:
        if len(s)<7:
            continue
        try:
            seats.append({
                'seat_id': int(s[0]),
                'theater_id': int(s[1]),
                'screen_id': int(s[2]),
                'row': s[3],
                'column': int(s[4]),
                'seat_type': s[5],
                'status': s[6]
            })
        except:
            continue
    return seats

def load_bookings():
    raw = read_data_file('bookings.txt')
    bookings = []
    for b in raw:
        if len(b)<8:
            continue
        try:
            seats_list = b[7].split(',') if b[7] else []
            bookings.append({
                'booking_id': int(b[0]),
                'showtime_id': int(b[1]),
                'customer_name': b[2],
                'customer_email': b[3],
                'booking_date': b[4],
                'total_price': float(b[5]),
                'status': b[6],
                'seats_booked': seats_list
            })
        except:
            continue
    return bookings

def load_genres():
    raw = read_data_file('genres.txt')
    genres = []
    for g in raw:
        if len(g)<3:
            continue
        try:
            genres.append({
                'genre_id': int(g[0]),
                'genre_name': g[1],
                'description': g[2]
            })
        except:
            continue
    return genres

def get_next_id(list_of_dicts, field):
    if not list_of_dicts:
        return 1
    return max(item[field] for item in list_of_dicts) + 1

# ROUTES

@app.route('/')
def dashboard():
    movies = load_movies()
    # Featured: 3 most recent by release_date descending
    featured = sorted(movies, key=lambda m: m['release_date'], reverse=True)[:3]
    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_movies=featured)

@app.route('/catalog')
def catalog():
    movies = load_movies()
    genres = load_genres()
    search = request.args.get('search','').strip().lower()
    genre_filter = request.args.get('genre_filter','')

    filtered = movies
    if search:
        filtered = [m for m in filtered if search in m['title'].lower() or search in m['genre'].lower()]
    if genre_filter:
        filtered = [m for m in filtered if m['genre'].lower() == genre_filter.lower()]

    return render_template('catalog.html', movies=filtered, genres=genres, search=search, genre_filter=genre_filter)

@app.route('/movie/<int:movie_id>')
def movie_details(movie_id):
    movies = load_movies()
    movie = next((m for m in movies if m['movie_id']==movie_id), None)
    if not movie:
        flash('Movie not found.')
        return redirect(url_for('catalog'))
    return render_template('movie_details.html', movie=movie)

@app.route('/showtimes/<int:movie_id>')
def showtimes(movie_id):
    showtimes = load_showtimes()
    theaters = load_theaters()
    theater_filter = request.args.get('theater_filter','')
    date_filter = request.args.get('date_filter','')

    filtered = [s for s in showtimes if s['movie_id']==movie_id]

    if theater_filter:
        try:
            theater_id_filter = int(theater_filter)
            filtered = [s for s in filtered if s['theater_id']==theater_id_filter]
        except:
            pass

    if date_filter:
        filtered = [s for s in filtered if s['showtime_date']==date_filter]

    theater_dict = {t['theater_id']: t for t in theaters}
    return render_template('showtimes.html', showtimes=filtered,
                           theaters=theaters,
                           theater_filter=theater_filter,
                           date_filter=date_filter,
                           theater_dict=theater_dict,
                           movie_id=movie_id)

@app.route('/seats/<int:showtime_id>', methods=['GET','POST'])
def seats(showtime_id):
    showtimes = load_showtimes()
    showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id), None)
    if not showtime:
        flash("Showtime not found.")
        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

    theaters = load_theaters()
    theater = next((t for t in theaters if t['theater_id']==showtime['theater_id']), None)
    if not theater:
        flash("Theater not found.")
        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

    seats_all = load_seats()
    theater_seats = [s for s in seats_all if s['theater_id']==theater['theater_id']]
    # Group seats by row, sorted by column:
    seat_map = {}
    for s in theater_seats:
        seat_map.setdefault(s['row'], []).append(s)
    for r in seat_map:
        seat_map[r].sort(key=lambda x: x['column'])
    sorted_rows = sorted(seat_map.keys())

    if request.method == 'POST':
        selected_seats = request.form.get('selected_seats','')
        if not selected_seats:
            flash("Please select at least one seat.")
            return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id))
        seats_list = selected_seats.split(',')
        # Validate seats availability
        booked_seat_codes = {seat['row']+str(seat['column']) for seat in seats_all if seat['status'].lower()=='booked' and seat['theater_id']==theater['theater_id']}
        for seat_code in seats_list:
            if seat_code in booked_seat_codes:
                flash(f"Seat {seat_code} is already booked.")
                return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id))
        # Redirect to confirm booking with params
        return redirect(url_for('confirm_booking', showtime_id=showtime_id, seats=selected_seats))

    return render_template('seats.html', showtime=showtime, theater=theater,
                           seat_map=seat_map, rows=sorted_rows)

@app.route('/confirm-booking', methods=['GET','POST'])
def confirm_booking():
    if request.method == 'GET':
        showtime_id = request.args.get('showtime_id')
        seats = request.args.get('seats','')
        if not showtime_id or not seats:
            flash("Booking info missing. Please select seats first.")
            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
        try:
            showtime_id_int = int(showtime_id)
        except:
            flash("Invalid showtime.")
            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

        showtimes = load_showtimes()
        showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id_int), None)
        if not showtime:
            flash("Showtime not found.")
            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

        movies = load_movies()
        movie = next((m for m in movies if m['movie_id']==showtime['movie_id']), None)
        if not movie:
            flash('Movie not found.')
            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

        seats_list = seats.split(',')
        return render_template('confirm_booking.html',
                               showtime=showtime,
                               movie=movie,
                               seats=seats_list)

    elif request.method == 'POST':
        showtime_id = request.form.get('showtime_id')
        seats = request.form.get('seats')
        customer_name = request.form.get('customer_name','').strip()
        customer_email = request.form.get('customer_email','').strip()

        if not (showtime_id and seats and customer_name and customer_email):
            flash("All fields are required.")
            return redirect(request.url)

        try:
            showtime_id_int = int(showtime_id)
        except:
            flash("Invalid showtime.")
            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

        seats_list = seats.split(',')

        showtimes = load_showtimes()
        showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id_int), None)
        if not showtime:
            flash("Showtime not found.")
            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

        # Check seats availability to avoid double booking
        seats_all = load_seats()
        theater_id = showtime['theater_id']
        booked_seats_set = {s['row']+str(s['column']) for s in seats_all if s['theater_id']==theater_id and s['status'].lower() == 'booked'}
        for seat_code in seats_list:
            if seat_code in booked_seats_set:
                flash(f"Seat {seat_code} is already booked.")
                return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id_int))

        bookings = load_bookings()
        next_booking_id = get_next_id(bookings, 'booking_id')
        booking_date = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
        total_price = showtime['price'] * len(seats_list)

        # Add new booking record
        bookings.append({
            'booking_id': next_booking_id,
            'showtime_id': showtime_id_int,
            'customer_name': customer_name,
            'customer_email': customer_email,
            'booking_date': booking_date,
            'total_price': total_price,
            'status': 'Confirmed',
            'seats_booked': seats
        })

        # Write bookings back
        lines = []
        for b in bookings:
            lines.append([
                str(b['booking_id']),
                str(b['showtime_id']),
                b['customer_name'],
                b['customer_email'],
                b['booking_date'],
                f"{b['total_price']:.2f}",
                b['status'],
                b['seats_booked']
            ])
        write_data_file('bookings.txt', lines)

        # Update seats.txt to mark selected seats booked
        for seat in seats_all:
            seat_code = seat['row'] + str(seat['column'])
            if seat['theater_id'] == theater_id and seat_code in seats_list:
                seat['status'] = 'Booked'
        seat_lines = []
        for s in seats_all:
            seat_lines.append([
                str(s['seat_id']),
                str(s['theater_id']),
                str(s['screen_id']),
                s['row'],
                str(s['column']),
                s['seat_type'],
                s['status']
            ])
        write_data_file('seats.txt', seat_lines)

        flash("Booking confirmed!")
        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

@app.route('/bookings')
def bookings():
    bookings = load_bookings()
    movies = load_movies()
    showtimes = load_showtimes()
    movie_dict = {m['movie_id']: m for m in movies}
    showtime_dict = {s['showtime_id']: s for s in showtimes}

    status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter','').lower()
    filtered = bookings
    if status_filter and status_filter != 'all':
        filtered = [b for b in bookings if b['status'].lower() == status_filter]

    # We'll pass showtime_dict and movie_dict for template to map booking->showtime->movie->title
    return render_template('bookings.html',
                           bookings=filtered,
                           movie_dict=movie_dict,
                           showtime_dict=showtime_dict,
                           status_filter=status_filter)

@app.route('/theaters')
def theaters():
    theaters = load_theaters()
    location_filter = request.args.get('location_filter','').strip()
    filtered = theaters
    if location_filter:
        filtered = [t for t in theaters if location_filter.lower() in (t['location'].lower() + ' ' + t['city'].lower())]

    locations = sorted(set([t['location'] for t in theaters] + [t['city'] for t in theaters]))

    facilities_display = ''
    if len(filtered)==1:
        facilities_display = filtered[0]['facilities']

    return render_template('theaters.html',
                           theaters=filtered,
                           locations=locations,
                           location_filter=location_filter,
                           facilities_display=facilities_display)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    if not os.path.exists(DATA_DIR):
        os.makedirs(DATA_DIR)
    app.run(debug=True)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Booking History</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="bookings-page">
        <h1>Booking History</h1>
        <form method="get" action="">
            <label for="status-filter">Filter by Status:</label>
            <select id="status-filter" name="status_filter">
                <option value="all" {% if status_filter=='all' %}selected{% endif %}>All</option>
                <option value="Confirmed" {% if status_filter=='confirmed' %}selected{% endif %}>Confirmed</option>
                <option value="Cancelled" {% if status_filter=='cancelled' %}selected{% endif %}>Cancelled</option>
                <option value="Completed" {% if status_filter=='completed' %}selected{% endif %}>Completed</option>
            </select>
            <button type="submit">Filter</button>
        </form>
        <table id="bookings-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Booking ID</th>
                    <th>Movie</th>
                    <th>Date</th>
                    <th>Seats</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Details</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for booking in bookings %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ booking.booking_id }}</td>
                    <td>
                        {% set st = showtime_dict.get(booking.showtime_id) %}
                        {% if st %}
                            {% set movie = movie_dict.get(st.movie_id) %}
                            {{ movie.title if movie else 'Unknown' }}
                        {% else %}
                            Unknown
                        {% endif %}
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ booking.booking_date }}</td>
                    <td>{{ booking.seats_booked | join(', ') }}</td>
                    <td>{{ booking.status }}</td>
                    <td><button id="view-booking-button-{{ booking.booking_id }}">View Details</button></td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        <button id="back-to-dashboard" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('dashboard') }}'">Back to Dashboard</button>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

=== /home/jun/0624/emnlp_CaMP_v2/results/Software-web/20260713_210028_869102_only_parallel_merge/MovieTicketing/vanilla/templates_candidate_a/seats.html ===
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Select Seats</title>
    <style>
    .seat-button {
        margin: 2px;
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
    }
    .seat-available {
        background-color: #4CAF50;
        color: white;
        cursor: pointer;
    }
    .seat-booked {
        background-color: #f44336;
        color: white;
        cursor: not-allowed;
    }
    .selected-seat {
        background-color: #ff9800 !important;
    }
    </style>
    <script>
    function toggleSeat(button) {
        if (button.classList.contains('seat-booked')) return;
        button.classList.toggle('selected-seat');
        const seatCode = button.getAttribute('data-seat-code');
        let selectedSeats = document.getElementById('selected-seats-display').innerText.split(', ').filter(s=>s);
        if (button.classList.contains('selected-seat')) {
            selectedSeats.push(seatCode);
        } else {
            selectedSeats = selectedSeats.filter(s=>s!==seatCode);
        }
        document.getElementById('selected-seats-display').innerText = selectedSeats.join(', ');
        document.getElementById('selected_seats_input').value = selectedSeats.join(',');
    }
    function submitSeats() {
        const seatsVal = document.getElementById('selected_seats_input').value;
        if (!seatsVal) {
            alert('Please select at least one seat.');
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="seat-selection-page">
        <h1>Select Seats</h1>
        <div id="seat-map">
            <form method="post" onsubmit="return submitSeats()">
                {% for row in rows %}
                <div>
                    <span>{{ row }}</span>
                    {% for seat in seat_map[row] %}
                    <button type="button" id="seat-{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}" class="seat-button {% if seat.status.lower()=='available' %}seat-available{% else %}seat-booked{% endif %}" data-seat-code="{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}" onclick="toggleSeat(this)" {% if seat.status.lower()!='available' %}disabled{% endif %}>{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}</button>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
                {% endfor %}
                <div>Selected Seats: <span id="selected-seats-display"></span></div>
                <input type="hidden" name="selected_seats" id="selected_seats_input" value="" />
                <button id="proceed-booking-button" type="submit">Proceed to Booking</button>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

as f:         for line in f:             line=line.strip()             if line:                 data.append(line.split('|'))     return data  def write_data_file(filename, data_lines):     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)     with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for items in data_lines:             f.write('|'.join(items) + '\n')  def load_movies():     raw =     })         except:             continue     return bookings  def load_genres():     raw = read_data_file('genres.txt')     genres = []     for g in raw:         if len(g)<3:             continue continue     return genres  def get_next_id(list_of_dicts, field):     if not list_of_dicts:         return 1     return max(item[field] for item in list_of_dicts) + 1  # ROUTES  @app.route('/') def dashboard():     movies = load_movies()     # Featured: 3 most recent by release_date descending     featured = sorted(movies, key=lambda m: m['release_date'], reverse=True)[:3]     return                   movie_id=movie_id)  @app.route('/seats/<int:showtime_id>', methods=['GET','POST']) def seats(showtime_id):     showtimes = load_showtimes()     showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id), None)     if not showtime:         flash("Showtime not found.")         return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))      theaters = load_theaters()     theater = next((t for t in theaters if t['theater_id']==showtime['theater_id']), None)     if not theater:         flash("Theater not found.")         return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))      seats_all = load_seats()     theater_seats = [s for s in seats_all if s['theater_id']==theater['theater_id']]     # Group seats by row, sorted by column:     seat_map = {}     for s in theater_seats:         seat_map.setdefault(s['row'], []).append(s)     for r in seat_map:         seat_map[r].sort(key=lambda x: x['column'])     sorted_rows = sorted(seat_map.keys())      if request.method == 'POST':         selected_seats = request.form.get('selected_seats','')         if not selected_seats:             flash("Please select at least one seat.")             return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id))         seats_list = selected_seats.split(',')         # Validate seats availability         booked_seat_codes = {seat['row']+str(seat['column']) for seat in seats_all if seat['status'].lower()=='booked' and seat['theater_id']==theater['theater_id']}         for seat_code in seats_list:             if seat_code in booked_seat_codes:                 flash(f"Seat {seat_code} is already booked.")                 return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id))         # Redirect to confirm booking with params         return seat_map=seat_map, rows=sorted_rows)  @app.route('/confirm-booking', methods=['GET','POST']) def confirm_booking():     if request.method == 'GET':         showtime_id = request.args.get('showtime_id')         seats = request.args.get('seats','')         if not showtime_id or not seats:             flash("Booking info missing. Please select seats first.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))         try:             showtime_id_int = int(showtime_id)         except:             flash("Invalid showtime.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          showtimes = load_showtimes()         showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id_int), None)         if not showtime:             flash("Showtime not found.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          movies = load_movies()         movie = next((m for m in movies if m['movie_id']==showtime['movie_id']), None)         if not movie:             flash('Movie not found.')             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          seats_list = seats.split(',')         return render_template('confirm_booking.html',                                showtime=showtime,                                movie=movie,                                seats=seats_list)      elif request.method == 'POST':         showtime_id = request.form.get('showtime_id')         seats = request.form.get('seats')         customer_name = request.form.get('customer_name','').strip()         customer_email = request.form.get('customer_email','').strip()          if not (showtime_id and seats and customer_name and customer_email):             flash("All fields are required.")             return redirect(request.url)          try:             showtime_id_int = int(showtime_id)         except:             flash("Invalid showtime.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          seats_list = seats.split(',')          showtimes = load_showtimes()         showtime = next((s for s in showtimes if s['showtime_id']==showtime_id_int), None)         if not showtime:             flash("Showtime not found.")             return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))          # Check seats availability to avoid double booking         seats_all = load_seats()         theater_id = showtime['theater_id']         booked_seats_set = {s['row']+str(s['column']) for s in seats_all if s['theater_id']==theater_id and s['status'].lower() == 'booked'}         for seat_code in seats_list:             if seat_code in booked_seats_set:                 flash(f"Seat {seat_code} is already booked.")                 return redirect(url_for('seats', showtime_id=showtime_id_int))          bookings = load_bookings()         next_booking_id = get_next_id(bookings, 'booking_id')         booking_date = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')         total_price = showtime['price'] * len(seats_list)          # Add new booking record         bookings.append({             'booking_id': next_booking_id,             'showtime_id': showtime_id_int,             'customer_name': customer_name,             'customer_email': customer_email,             'booking_date': booking_date,             'total_price': total_price,             'status': 'Confirmed',             'seats_booked': seats         })          # Write bookings back         lines = []         for b in bookings:             lines.append([                 str(b['booking_id']),                 str(b['showtime_id']),                 b['customer_name'],                 b['customer_email'],                 b['booking_date'],                 f"{b['total_price']:.2f}",                 b['status'],                 b['seats_booked']             ])         write_data_file('bookings.txt', lines)          # Update seats.txt to mark selected seats booked         for seat in seats_all:             seat_code = seat['row'] + str(seat['column'])             if seat['theater_id'] == theater_id and seat_code in seats_list:                 seat['status'] = 'Booked'         seat_lines = []         for s in seats_all:             seat_lines.append([                 str(s['seat_id']),                 str(s['theater_id']),                 str(s['screen_id']),                 s['row'],                 str(s['column']),                 s['seat_type'],                 s['status']             ])         write_data_file('seats.txt', seat_lines)          flash("Booking confirmed!")         return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))  @app.route('/bookings') def bookings():     bookings = load_bookings()     movies = load_movies()     showtimes = load_showtimes()     movie_dict = {m['movie_id']: m for m in movies}     showtime_dict = {s['showtime_id']: s for s in showtimes}      status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter','').lower()     filtered = bookings     if status_filter and status_filter != 'all':         filtered = [b for b in bookings if b['status'].lower() == status_filter]      #   [app_candidate_b.py] from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for, jsonify from datetime import datetime import os  app = Flask(__name__) DATA_DIR = 'data'  # Utility functions to load data  def load_movies():     movies = []     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'movies.txt')     if os.path.exists(path):         with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line=line.strip()                 if not line:                     continue                 parts = line.split('|')                 if len(parts) < 8:                     continue                 movie = {                     'movie_id': int(parts[0]),                     'title': parts[1],                     'director': parts[2],                     'genre': parts[3],                     'rating': float(parts[4]),                     'duration': int(parts[5]),                     'description': parts[6],                     'release_date': parts[7]                 }                 movies.append(movie)     return movies  def load_theaters():     theaters = []     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'theaters.txt')     if os.path.exists(path):         with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line=line.strip()                 if not line:                     continue                 parts = line.split('|')                 if len(parts) < 6:                     continue                 theater = {                     'theater_id': int(parts[0]),                     'theater_name': parts[1],                     'location': parts[2],                     'city': parts[3],                     'screens': int(parts[4]),                     'facilities': parts[5]                 }                 theaters.append(theater)     return theaters  def load_showtimes():     showtimes = []     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'showtimes.txt')     if os.path.exists(path):         with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line=line.strip()                 if not line:                     continue                 parts = line.split('|')                 if len(parts) < 7:                     continue                 try:                     showtime = {                         'showtime_id': int(parts[0]),                         'movie_id': int(parts[1]),                         'theater_id': int(parts[2]),                         'showtime_date': parts[3],                         'showtime_time': parts[4],                         'price': float(parts[5]),                         'available_seats': int(parts[6])                     }                     showtimes.append(showtime)                 except:                     continue     return showtimes  def load_seats():     seats = []     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'seats.txt')     if os.path.exists(path):         with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line=line.strip()                 if not line:                     continue                 parts = line.split('|')                 if len(parts) < 7:                     continue                 try:                     seat = {                         'seat_id': int(parts[0]),                         'theater_id': int(parts[1]),                         'screen_id': int(parts[2]),                         'row': parts[3],                         'column': int(parts[4]),                         'seat_type': parts[5],                         'status': parts[6]  # 'Available' or 'Booked'                     }                     seats.append(seat)                 except:                     continue     return seats  def load_bookings():     bookings = []     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'bookings.txt')     if os.path.exists(path):         with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line=line.strip()                 if not line:                     continue                 parts = line.split('|')                 if len(parts) < 8:                     continue                 booking = {                     'booking_id': int(parts[0]),                     'showtime_id': int(parts[1]),                     'customer_name': parts[2],                     'customer_email': parts[3],                     'booking_date': parts[4],                     'total_price': float(parts[5]),                     'status': parts[6],                     'seats_booked': parts[7].split(',') if parts[7] else []                 }                 bookings.append(booking)     return bookings  def load_genres():     genres = []     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'genres.txt')     if os.path.exists(path):         with open(path, encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line=line.strip()                 if not line:                     continue                 parts = line.split('|')                 if len(parts) < 3:                     continue                 genre = {                     'genre_id': int(parts[0]),                     'genre_name': parts[1], with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for b in bookings:             line = f"{b['booking_id']}|{b['showtime_id']}|{b['customer_name']}|{b['customer_email']}|{b['booking_date']}|{b['total_price']}|{b['status']}|{','.join(b['seats_booked'])}"             f.write(line + "\n")  # Save seats  def save_seats(seats):     path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'seats.txt')     with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for s in seats:             line = f"{s['seat_id']}|{s['theater_id']}|{s['screen_id']}|{s['row']}|{s['column']}|{s['seat_type']}|{s['status']}"             f.write(line + "\n")  # Helpers for seat identification  def seat_code(row, col):     return f"{row}{col}"  def seat_id_from_code(seat_code_str):     # e.g. A1 -> row=A, col=1     if len(seat_code_str) < 2:         return None     row = seat_code_str[0]     try:         col = int(seat_code_str[1:])     except:         return None     return (row, col)  @app.route('/') def dashboard():     """Render the Dashboard page with featured movies and navigation."""     movies = <!DOCTYPE html>

    <div id="bookings-page">
        <h1>Booking History</h1>
        <form method="get" action="">
            <label for="status-filter">Filter by Status:</label>
            <select id="status-filter" name="status_filter">
                <option value="all" {% if status_filter=='all' %}selected{% endif %}>All</option>
                <option value="Confirmed" {% if status_filter=='confirmed' %}selected{% endif %}>Confirmed</option>
                <option value="Cancelled" {% if status_filter=='cancelled' %}selected{% endif %}>Cancelled</option>
                <option value="Completed" {% if status_filter=='completed' %}selected{% endif %}>Completed</option>
            </select>
            <button type="submit">Filter</button>
        </form>
        <table id="bookings-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Booking ID</th>
                    <th>Movie</th>
                    <th>Date</th>
                    <th>Seats</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Details</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for booking in bookings %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ booking.booking_id }}</td>
                    <td>
                        {% set st = showtime_dict.get(booking.showtime_id) %}
                        {% if st %}
                            {% set movie = movie_dict.get(st.movie_id) %}
                            {{ movie.title if movie else 'Unknown' }}
                        {% else %}
                            Unknown
                        {% endif %}
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ booking.booking_date }}</td>
                    <td>{{ booking.seats_booked | join(', ') }}</td>
                    <td>{{ booking.status }}</td>
                    <td><button id="view-booking-button-{{ booking.booking_id }}">View Details</button></td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        <button id="back-to-dashboard" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('dashboard') }}'">Back to Dashboard</button>
    </div>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Booking Confirmation</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="confirmation-page">
        <h1>Booking Confirmation</h1>
        <div id="booking-summary">
            <p><strong>Movie:</strong> {{ movie.title }}</p>
            <p><strong>Date:</strong> {{ showtime.showtime_date }}</p>
            <p><strong>Time:</strong> {{ showtime.showtime_time }}</p>
            <p><strong>Seats:</strong> {{ seats | join(", ") }}</p>
            <p><strong>Price per ticket:</strong> ${{ '%.2f'|format(showtime.price) }}</p>
            <p><strong>Total Price:</strong> ${{ '%.2f'|(showtime.price * seats|length) }}</p>
        </div>
        <form method="post">
            <input type="hidden" name="showtime_id" value="{{ showtime.showtime_id }}" />
            <input type="hidden" name="seats" value="{{ seats|join(',') }}" />
            <label for="customer-name">Name:</label><br />
            <input id="customer-name" type="text" name="customer_name" required /><br />
            <label for="customer-email">Email:</label><br />
            <input id="customer-email" type="email" name="customer_email" required /><br />
            <button id="confirm-booking-button" type="submit">Confirm Booking</button>
        </form>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

===== templates_candidate_a/seats.html =====
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Select Seats</title>
    <style>
    .seat-button {
        margin: 2px;
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
    }
    .seat-available {
        background-color: #4CAF50;
        color: white;
        cursor: pointer;
    }
    .seat-booked {
        background-color: #f44336;
        color: white;
        cursor: not-allowed;
    }
    .selected-seat {
        background-color: #ff9800 !important;
    }
    </style>
    <script>
    function toggleSeat(button) {
        if (button.classList.contains('seat-booked')) return;
        button.classList.toggle('selected-seat');
        const seatCode = button.getAttribute('data-seat-code');
        let selectedSeats = document.getElementById('selected-seats-display').innerText.split(', ').filter(s=>s);
        if (button.classList.contains('selected-seat')) {
            selectedSeats.push(seatCode);
        } else {
            selectedSeats = selectedSeats.filter(s=>s!==seatCode);
        }
        document.getElementById('selected-seats-display').innerText = selectedSeats.join(', ');
        document.getElementById('selected_seats_input').value = selectedSeats.join(',');
    }
    function submitSeats() {
        const seatsVal = document.getElementById('selected_seats_input').value;
        if (!seatsVal) {
            alert('Please select at least one seat.');
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="seat-selection-page">
        <h1>Select Seats</h1>
        <div id="seat-map">
            <form method="post" onsubmit="return submitSeats()">
                {% for row in rows %}
                <div>
                    <span>{{ row }}</span>
                    {% for seat in seat_map[row] %}
                    <button type="button" id="seat-{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}" class="seat-button {% if seat.status.lower()=='available' %}seat-available{% else %}seat-booked{% endif %}" data-seat-code="{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}" onclick="toggleSeat(this)" {% if seat.status.lower()!='available' %}disabled{% endif %}>{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}</button>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
                {% endfor %}
                <div>Selected Seats: <span id="selected-seats-display"></span></div>
                <input type="hidden" name="selected_seats" id="selected_seats_input" value="" />
                <button id="proceed-booking-button" type="submit">Proceed to Booking</button>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

                <option value="Confirmed" {% if status_filter == 'confirmed' %}selected{% endif %}>Confirmed</option>
                <option value="Cancelled" {% if status_filter == 'cancelled' %}selected{% endif %}>Cancelled</option>
                <option value="Completed" {% if status_filter == 'completed' %}selected{% endif %}>Completed</option>
            </select>

            <thead>

                    <th>Date</th>
                    <th>Seats</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Actions</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for booking in bookings %}
                    <tr>
                        <td>{{ booking.booking_id }}</td>
                        <td>{{ movie_map.get(booking.showtime_id and booking.showtime_id > 0 and (booking.showtime_id in movie_map) and booking.showtime_id or None) or "" }}</td>

                        <td>{{ booking.seats_booked | join(", ") }}</td>
                        <td>{{ booking.status }}</td>
                        <td><button id="view-booking-button-{{ booking.booking_id }}" onclick="alert('Booking Details:\nMovie: {{ movie_map.get(booking.showtime_id, '') }}\nDate: {{ booking.booking_date }}\nSeats: {{ booking.seats_booked | join(', ') }}\nStatus: {{ booking.status }}')">View</button></td>
                    </tr>
                {% else %}
                    <tr><td colspan="6">No bookings found.</td></tr>
                {% endfor %}

===== templates_candidate_b/seat_selection.html =====
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Select Seats</title>
    <style>
        #seat-map {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .seat-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .seat-Available {
            background-color: #90ee90;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .seat-Booked {
            background-color: #ff6961;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
    </style>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            const seatStatusMap = JSON.parse('{{ seat_status_map | tojson | safe }}');
            const selectedSeats = new Set();
            function updateSelectedDisplay() {
                const display = document.getElementById('selected-seats-display');
                display.textContent = 'Selected Seats: ' + Array.from(selectedSeats).join(', ');
            }
            // Create seat buttons dynamically
            const seatMapDiv = document.getElementById('seat-map');

            // Clear manually inserted seats (if any)
            seatMapDiv.innerHTML = '';

            const rows = {{ rows|length }};

            {% for row, seats_in_row in rows %}
                let rowDiv = document.createElement('div');
                rowDiv.className = 'seat-row';
                let seatsInRow = {{ seats_in_row|length }};

                {% for seat in seats_in_row %}
                    let seatBtn = document.createElement('button');
                    let seatCode = '{{ seat.row }}{{ seat.column }}';
                    seatBtn.id = 'seat-' + seatCode;
                    seatBtn.textContent = seatCode;
                    seatBtn.className = 'seat-' + (seatStatusMap[seatCode] || 'Available');
                    if ((seatStatusMap[seatCode] || 'Available') === 'Booked') {
                        seatBtn.disabled = true;
                    }
                    seatBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        if (seatBtn.classList.contains('seat-Available')) {
                            if (selectedSeats.has(seatCode)) {
                                selectedSeats.delete(seatCode);
                                seatBtn.style.border = '';
                            } else {
                                selectedSeats.add(seatCode);
                                seatBtn.style.border = '2px solid blue';
                            }
                            updateSelectedDisplay();
                        }
                    });
                    rowDiv.appendChild(seatBtn);
                {% endfor %}

                seatMapDiv.appendChild(rowDiv);
            {% endfor %}

            updateSelectedDisplay();

            document.getElementById('proceed-booking-button').addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (selectedSeats.size === 0) {
                    alert('Please select at least one seat.');
                    return;
                }
                // Redirect to confirmation page with query parameters
                const showtimeId = '{{ showtime.showtime_id }}';
                const seatsParam = Array.from(selectedSeats).join(',');
                window.location.href = `{{ url_for('confirm_booking') }}?showtime_id=${showtimeId}&selected_seats=${encodeURIComponent(seatsParam)}`;
            });
        });
    </script>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="seat-selection-page">
        <h1>Select Seats for {{ movie.title }}</h1>
        <div id="seat-map">
            <!-- Seat buttons dynamically created -->
        </div>
        <div id="selected-seats-display">Selected Seats: None</div>
        <button id="proceed-booking-button">Proceed to Booking</button>
        <button onclick="location.href='{{ url_for('showtimes', movie_id=movie.movie_id) }}'">Back to Showtimes</button>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

                <option value="All" {% if theater_filter.lower() == 'all' or theater_filter == '' %}selected{% endif %}>All</option>
                {% for theater in theaters %}
                    <option value="{{ theater.theater_id }}" {% if theater_filter == theater.theater_id|string %}selected{% endif %}>{{ theater.theater_name }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
            </select>
            <input type="date" id="date-filter" name="date" value="{{ date_filter }}" />

        </form>

            {% if showtimes %}
                <ul>
                {% for st in showtimes %}
                    <li>
                        Date: {{ st.showtime_date }}, Time: {{ st.showtime_time }},
                        Theater: {{ theater_dict[st.theater_id].theater_name if st.theater_id in theater_dict else 'Unknown' }},
                        Price: ${{ '%.2f'|format(st.price) }}
                        <button id="select-showtime-button-{{ st.showtime_id }}" onclick="location.href='{{ url_for('seat_selection', showtime_id=st.showtime_id) }}'">Select</button>
                    </li>
                {% endfor %}
                </ul>
            {% else %}
                <p>No showtimes found.</p>
            {% endif %}
        </div>
        <button onclick="location.href='{{ url_for('movie_details', movie_id=movie.movie_id) }}'">Back to Movie Details</button>
